title: Realistic Falling Sound
description: Experience falling in a windy manner like never before!
body:
⚠️**Important**⚠️

Mod requires the *[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)*.

<hr>

**Description:**

This mod aims to make falling a long distance in Minecraft more immersive, by playing a **wind** sound effect. The sound starts playing when you reach a vertical speed of about 10 blocks/s. Currently, as of **v1.0.0** this mod has no config, or ways to toggle itself; features like these will be added future versions.

For reference of this mod, watch the **Demo Video Below**...

<hr>

**Demo Vid**

<iframe width="1494" height="840" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/BWoSn9xzXVg" title="[MINECRAFT] Realistic Falling Sound Mod Demo (1.21.11, Fabric, CLIENT)" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<hr>

**Support me?**

If you want, you can donate to me by clicking the link in the **Side Bar**, to get redirected to my PayPal donation page.
